content:
Greetings Keepers,

We are actively looking for talented **Content Creators** for our community! We want to see your streams, videos, any media platform,  and more related to Morimens!

All languages are welcome! 🌍 We love seeing diverse perspectives.

As part of this initiative, we will be granting creators permission to post their content directly in our official <#1435483703114596503>  channel to share with the entire community.

If you create content related to Morimens, please message <@575252669443211264> and ask to gain access to this role and channel. 

 Let's grow the community together! 

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

各位守护者们，大家好！ 

我们正在积极寻找才华横溢的内容创作者加入我们的社区！我们期待看到你们的直播、视频、攻略、艺术作品以及更多与莫里门相关的精彩内容！ 

我们欢迎所有语言的创作！🌍 我们热爱多元化的视角。 

作为这项计划的一部分，我们将授权创作者直接在官方频道“Morimens TV”发布内容，与整个社区分享。 

如果您创作的内容与 Morimens 相关，请私信 <@575252669443211264> 并申请获得此角色和频道的访问权限。

让我们一起壮大社区！

@everyone
